title: S.O. No. 4156(E) dated 23.12.2016- Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
description: S.O. No. 4156(E) dated 23.12.2016- Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 3040] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] fnlEcj 23] 2016@ikS"k 2] 1938 No. 3040] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY DECEMBER 23, 2016/PAUSA 2, 1938 पयाᭅ वरण वन एवं जलवायु पᳯरवतᭅ न मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 23 ᳰदस᭥बर 2016 का.आ. 4156(अ).—जीव-ज᭠तु ᮓूरता िनवारण अिधिनयम 1960 (1960 का 59) कᳱ धारा 4 कᳱ उप धारा (1) और धारा 5क ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, के᭠ᮤ सरकार ᮰ी रिव शंकर ᮧसाद, संयुᲦ सिचव (पशु क᭨याण), पयाᭅवरण वन एवं जलवायु पᳯरवतᭅन मंᮢालय को ᮰ी अिनल संत के ᭭ थान पर धारा 5 (1)(ज) के अधीन भारतीय जीव-ज᭠तु क᭨याण बोडᭅ, चै᳖ई के सद᭭य के ᱧप म ᱶ ᳰदनांक 07-10-2016 से 28-02-2017 तक कᳱ अविध के िलए नािमत करती है। [फा. सं. 11/8/2013-ए ड᭣᭨यू डी] एस. गौरी शंकर, उप सिचव (पशु क᭨याण) MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd December, 2016 S.O. 4156(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 4 and Section 5A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby nominates Shri Ravi Shanker Prasad, Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare) Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change in place of Shri Anil Sant as the Member of the Animal Welfare Board of India, Chennai for a period from 7.10.2016 to 28.02.2017 under Section 5(1)(h) of the PCA Act, 1960 or until the reconstitution of the Board whichever is later. [F. No.11/8/2013-AWD] S.GOWRI SHANKAR, Dy. Secy. (AW) 5902 GI/2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
